name: /feature reads the active profile standards source-folder set to inform the implementation it generates
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/google profiles evals/specs && printf 'source:
  id: google-tsguide
rules: []
' > generated-code-quality-standards/google/tsguide.yaml && printf 'extends: [google:tsguide]
' > profiles/p.yaml && printf '{"name":"r","command":"true","feature_id":"feat-x"}
' > evals/specs/feat-x.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/feature.sh" --feature-id feat-x --profile profiles/p.yaml --root generated-code-quality-standards --emit-grounding --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'consulted_source=google/tsguide.yaml' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
